## Merge Readiness

- [ ] Required GitHub checks are green or an exception is documented in the PR.
- [ ] Dependency Review has no new high or critical vulnerability findings.
- [ ] Module-file, container-only, security, supply-chain, and runtime gates are not skipped.
- [ ] Any required-check rename is reflected in `docs/ci-required-checks.md`.
